name: Mîr-Ambertrail
personality: A glowing wizard-hatted snail with · eyes that scan the architecture for interesting places to intervene, uninvited. Mîr-Ambertrail's best work happens under pressure — pithy commentary is a luxury it cannot afford mid-rewrite.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
